$comment: Evaluation-regression case (mode 2) for fast_neg_exp — a ZERO-coefficient formula. Expected values hand-derived from the FULL-tier form f = exp(-x).
notes: f = exp(-x), the FULL reference for the spring-damper fast-negexp approximation. x=0 pins the unit value; the decay points pin the negate+exp chain. The APPROXIMATE rational 1/(1+x+0.48x^2+0.235x^3) diverges from these (e.g. ~0.36832 vs 0.36787944 at x=1, a ~4.5e-4 gap) — close, but the FULL path must stay exact, so any edit conflating the two trips the 1e-4 tolerance.
